statement: At about 5:40 p.m. in the misting corridor, I saw Mara Venn confront Elian Greer and heard the phrase 'not after tonight,' though I could not hear the rest of the conversation.
I saw Greer wiping soil from his cuff around 6:05 p.m., and later at about 7:02 p.m. he appeared calm while speaking with a guest in the fern gallery.

Security records showed all external doors closed at 6:22 p.m.; I saw Mara enter the orchid vault at 6:46 p.m., observed no movement at 7:14 p.m., and forced entry at 7:18 p.m. after the confirmation sequence failed.

From 6:31 p.m. onward, I observed Livia Saye and Oren Vale together in the lecture room, knew Mara intended to give Oren a confidential report, and was present when the display sequence failed at 7:18 p.m.
Greer had previously asked me for private access to rare specimens, and I observed that Oren Vale remained with me from 6:31 p.m. onward during the donor preview.
I never entered the orchid vault or orchid wing after 6:30 p.m. and had nothing to do with Mara Venn's death.
